description:
Fills UNP CCIT Appraisal Sheets and Reports of Rating from Periodic Grades Listing PDFs

A small tool for UNP CCIT advisers, available as a standalone desktop app or a local web app. It reads Periodic Grades Listing PDFs from the student portal and fills two official forms for every advisee: the Appraisal Sheet (VPAA-CCIT-QF-05) and the Report of Rating (VPAA-CCIT-QF-09).
